title: In vitro α-amylase and α-glucosidase inhibitory assay
author: Maira Rubí Segura-Campos
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.tgfejtn

steps.title: Starch suspended in 0
steps.instruction: Starch suspended in 0.2 mL of 0.5 M Tris-HCl pH 6.9 (0.01M CaCl2) Tris-HCl Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) undetermined, Starch

steps.title: Boil (5 min) and pre-incubate the substrate solution 00:05:00 Undetermined
steps.instruction: Boil (5 min) and pre-incubate the substrate solution 00:05:00 Undetermined

steps.title: Aqueous extract dissolution undetermined, dissolved with 1 mL of 0
steps.instruction: Aqueous extract dissolution undetermined, dissolved with 1 mL of 0.1% DMSO

steps.title: Mix 0
steps.instruction: Mix 0.2mL of the aqueous extract with the substrate solution, and 0.1 mL of porcine pancreatic amylase in Tris-HCl buffer (2 U/mL) 00:10:00 Porcine pancreatic amylase Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Undetermined

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.5 mL of acetic acid (50% v/v) and centrifuge 00:05:00, at 1811 g Undetermined

steps.title: The inhibitory activity is calculated using...
steps.instruction: The inhibitory activity is calculated using the formula (Ac+) – (Ac-) – (As - Ab)/(Ac+) – (Ac-) × 100, where Ac+, Ac-, As, Ab are defined as the absorbance, at 595 nm, of 100% enzyme activity (only solvent with enzyme), 0% enzyme activity (only solvent without enzyme), the test sample (with enzyme), and a blank (a test sample without enzyme), respectively

steps.title: Mix 2 U/mL of the α-glucosidase...
steps.instruction: Mix 2 U/mL of the α-glucosidase enzyme with 20 μL of aqueous extract (1mg/mL) alpha-glucosidase enzyme Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) 00:05:00 Undetermined

steps.title: Add 1 mM of pNPG (pH 6
steps.instruction: Add 1 mM of pNPG (pH 6.8; buffered with 50mM of phosphate) and incubate p-nitrophenyl glucopyranoside Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) undetermined 00:20:00 Undetermined

steps.title: Add 1 mM of sodium carbonate undetermined
steps.instruction: Add 1 mM of sodium carbonate undetermined

steps.title: The inhibitory activity is calculated using...
steps.instruction: The inhibitory activity is calculated using the formula (Ac + ) – (Ac - ) – (As - Ab)/(Ac + ) – (Ac - )× 100, where Ac + , Ac - , As, and Ab are defined as the absorbance, at 405 nm, of 100% enzyme activity (only solvent with enzyme), 0% enzyme activity (only solvent without enzyme), the test sample (with enzyme), and a blank (a test sample without enzyme), respectively. Acarbose Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Acarbose is an anti-hyperglycemic drug that is used as a control
